summary: Iteration 76 - Testing trilingual translation (Arabic/English/Kurdish) across multiple pages. Found critical issues with Kurdish translations and language persistence after login.

ui_bugs.issue: Form labels (البريد الإلكتروني, كلمة المرور, تسجيل الدخول) not translating to Kurdish. Shows Arabic instead of Kurdish (ئیمەیل, وشەی نهێنی, چوونەژوورەوە)
ui_bugs.root_cause: Duplicate entries in autoTranslate.js - later entries with empty Kurdish values overwrite earlier correct translations

integration_issues.issue: User's language selection is overwritten by tenant's regional settings from API (/api/tenant/regional-settings). When user selects Arabic on login page, after login the language resets to English (tenant's default).
integration_issues.root_cause: CurrencyContext.js fetches regional settings and overwrites localStorage app_language with API response value

kurdish.issue: Form labels show Arabic instead of Kurdish

dashboard_translation.issue: Dashboard always shows English regardless of language selection
dashboard_translation.root_cause: Tenant regional settings API returns language: 'en' which overwrites user's selection

delivery_page_translation.reason: Language resets to English after login due to API override

action_items: CRITICAL: Remove duplicate entries in /app/frontend/src/utils/autoTranslate.js - Keep only entries with Kurdish translations, remove entries with empty ku values

CRITICAL: Fix language persistence - User's language selection should NOT be overwritten by tenant's regional settings. Consider: (1) Only use tenant settings as default for new users, (2) Allow user preference to override tenant settings

Verify Kurdish translations exist for all texts mentioned in requirements: 'لتتبع السائقين', 'محصل/غير محصل', 'مدفوع/غير مدفوع', 'غير معين', 'غير معروف', 'مورد غير معروف', 'رقم الفاتورة', 'الأصناف', 'معايير التقييم التلقائي', 'وارد', 'صادر', 'غير محدد', 'سليم', 'مشكلة', 'سعة النظام'
critical_code_review_comments: autoTranslate.js has 3600+ lines with many duplicate entries - needs cleanup
Duplicate keys in JavaScript objects cause last value to win, breaking translations
Language management is split between useTranslation hook, LanguageContext, and CurrencyContext - needs consolidation
CurrencyContext.js line 79 overwrites user's language preference with API response
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kurdish translations are broken due to duplicate entries in autoTranslate.js. Language selection doesn't persist after login because CurrencyContext overwrites it with tenant settings. Main agent needs to: 1) Clean up duplicate entries in autoTranslate.js, 2) Fix language persistence logic in CurrencyContext.js

kurdish_translation_bug.symptom: Kurdish translations not showing on Login page
kurdish_translation_bug.root_cause: Duplicate entries in autoTranslate.js with empty Kurdish values overwrite correct translations
kurdish_translation_bug.evidence: node -e shows البريد الإلكتروني has ku:'' instead of ku:'ئیمەیل'
kurdish_translation_bug.fix: Remove duplicate entries, keep only first occurrence with Kurdish translations

language_persistence_bug.symptom: Language resets to English after login
language_persistence_bug.root_cause: CurrencyContext.js fetches /api/tenant/regional-settings and overwrites localStorage app_language
language_persistence_bug.evidence: API returns language:'en', localStorage shows 'en' after login even when user selected Arabic
language_persistence_bug.fix: Don't overwrite user's language preference, or use tenant settings only as default
